title: Senior Python Developer
description: We are looking for an experienced Python developer to design, build, and maintain scalable backend services. The ideal candidate has deep expertise in Python frameworks such as FastAPI and Django, strong SQL database skills, and experience with Docker and AWS cloud services. You will work closely with data science teams to implement ML model serving pipelines. 5+ years experience required.

title: Junior Frontend Developer
description: Entry-level position for a passionate frontend developer. You will build interactive user interfaces using React and modern CSS. Knowledge of JavaScript, HTML5, and responsive design is essential. Familiarity with Git and agile development practices preferred. This role is ideal for recent graduates with 0-2 years of experience.

title: Data Analyst
description: Seeking a detail-oriented Data Analyst to transform raw data into actionable insights. You will create dashboards, write SQL queries, perform statistical analysis, and present findings to stakeholders. Proficiency in Python, SQL, Excel, and visualization tools like Tableau or Power BI is required. 2+ years experience.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Join our AI team to develop and deploy machine learning models. Strong Python skills, experience with TensorFlow or PyTorch, NLP techniques, and ML pipeline development are essential. You should understand feature engineering, model evaluation, and MLOps practices. Master's degree preferred.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: We need a DevOps engineer to maintain our CI/CD pipelines, manage cloud infrastructure on AWS/GCP, and ensure system reliability. Experience with Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform, and monitoring tools is required. You will automate deployments and improve developer experience.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Looking for a versatile Full Stack Developer comfortable with both frontend and backend. You will work with React on the frontend and Node.js or Python on the backend, managing PostgreSQL databases. Experience with REST APIs and cloud deployment required.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Design and implement robust backend services using Java or Python. You will build RESTful APIs, manage database schemas, optimize query performance, and ensure high availability. Experience with microservices architecture and message queues preferred.

title: React Developer
description: Specialized frontend role focused on building complex React applications. Deep knowledge of React hooks, state management, TypeScript, and modern frontend tooling required. Experience with Next.js and TailwindCSS is a plus.

title: AI Research Engineer
description: Conduct applied AI research and develop prototype models for NLP and computer vision tasks. Strong foundation in deep learning, published research, and hands-on experience with PyTorch required. PhD or Master's in CS/AI preferred.

title: Cloud Engineer
description: Manage and optimize cloud infrastructure across AWS and GCP. Design scalable architectures, implement infrastructure-as-code with Terraform, and ensure security compliance. Experience with serverless computing and container orchestration.

title: Data Scientist
description: Apply statistical and machine learning techniques to solve business problems. Develop predictive models, perform A/B testing, and communicate insights through data storytelling. Strong Python, pandas, and visualization skills required.

title: UI/UX Designer
description: Design intuitive and beautiful user experiences for our web and mobile products. Create wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups. Experience with Figma, user research, and design systems is essential.

title: Java Developer
description: Senior Java developer to build enterprise-grade applications using Spring Boot and microservices. Strong knowledge of JVM internals, design patterns, and SQL databases required. Experience with Kafka and distributed systems is a plus.

title: Mobile Developer
description: Build cross-platform mobile applications using React Native or Flutter. Experience with native iOS/Android development is a plus. Must understand mobile UI patterns, state management, and API integration.

title: QA Automation Engineer
description: Design and implement automated test suites for web and API testing. Experience with Selenium, Cypress, or Playwright required. Knowledge of CI/CD integration and test strategy design is essential.

title: Site Reliability Engineer
description: Ensure the reliability and performance of our production systems. Implement monitoring, alerting, and incident response procedures. Strong Linux administration and scripting skills required.

title: NLP Engineer
description: Develop natural language processing solutions for text analysis and information extraction. Experience with spaCy, transformers, and text classification models required. Build production-ready NLP pipelines.

title: Product Manager - Tech
description: Lead product development for our AI platform. Define roadmaps, prioritize features, and coordinate with engineering teams. Strong technical background with understanding of ML/AI concepts required.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor, detect, and respond to security incidents. Perform vulnerability assessments and penetration testing. Knowledge of OWASP, network security, and security tools is essential.

title: Blockchain Developer
description: Develop smart contracts and decentralized applications. Experience with Solidity, Ethereum, and Web3 technologies required. Understanding of consensus mechanisms and crypto economics preferred.
